title: NINA SEAPOP — Catalog / Discovery Metadata
abstract: OGC API Records and STAC Collection metadata for the NINA SEAPOP seabird dataset. Links to both the raw OBIS source (BB1) and OIM target model (BB2).
description:
## Dataset summary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Programme | SEAPOP — Norwegian Seabird Population Monitoring |
| Institution | Norwegian Institute for Nature Research (NINA) |
| Records | 279,170 |
| Coverage | Norway + Svalbard (3.4°–31.2°E, 5.9°–71.2°N) |
| Temporal | 2014–present (updated 2025-09-22) |
| Taxa | Seabirds (class Aves) |
| License | CC-BY 4.0 |
| DOI | 10.15468/gk9xqd |

## Linked distributions

| Role | Endpoint | Building Block |
|---|---|---|
| Source (OBIS, enriched) | `https://api.obis.org/v3/occurrence?datasetid=561441ab-128b-4be7-8fce-de1ef79855da` | BB1: nina-seapop-source |
| Source (GBIF, clean DwC) | `https://api.gbif.org/v1/occurrence/search?datasetKey=4c7a13a5-72b1-41ff-ad7c-8af40d3cc3cc` | BB1: nina-seapop-source |
| Target (OIM GeoJSON Features) | TBD — OGC API Features endpoint | BB2: nina-seapop-oim |

## STAC extensions applied

- **scientific** (`sci:doi`, `sci:citation`) — DOI and full citation
- **prov** (`prov:wasGeneratedBy`) — activity provenance back to NINA

## Metadata gaps

The following metadata is not automatically extractable and requires manual input:
- OGC API Features endpoint URL (when deployed)
- Contact email for dataset queries
- Funding/project references (SEAPOP partner list)
- Full temporal extent per colony (varies by locality)
usageGuidance: Use this record as the OGC API Records item for the NINA SEAPOP dataset in a federated catalog.
Update the links array with the OGC API Features endpoint URL once the BB2 endpoint is deployed.
The GBIF distribution should be preferred over OBIS for workflows requiring eventDate or individualCount.
